final_answer:
Nahi. **100% rename nahi hoya** main chain code ch.

`bsc/bnb` references ajj vi ne, for example:
- [config.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-chain/params/config.go#L214) (`BSCChainConfig`, `BSCGenesisHash`, `IsInBSC`)
- [genesis.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-chain/core/genesis.go#L674) (`DefaultBSCGenesisBlock`)
- [flags.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-chain/cmd/utils/flags.go#L195) (`BSCMainnetFlag`)
- [System.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-genesis-contract/contracts/System.sol#L11) (`bscChainID`)
- [StakeHub.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-genesis-contract/contracts/StakeHub.sol#L107) (`minSelfDelegationBNB`, `bnbAmount`)
- [validators.template](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-genesis-contract/scripts/validators.template#L9) (`bscFeeAddr`)

File/folder names source-level mostly clean ne, but generated/cache areas vich old names ajj vi ne (e.g. `out/*BSC*.json`, `.gomodcache/.../bnb-chain`).
prompt: fudu sari files and folders da name change hogya? koi bsc/bnb references ni? main chain de code ch?
